# oasf-agent-directory-mcp

> OASF / AGNTCY agent directory MCP — bridges Cisco's Open Agentic Schema Framework to MCP + A2A. Linux Foundation governed. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- describe_agent_as_oasf
- validate_oasf_schema
- publish_to_agntcy_directory
- search_oasf_directory
- bridge_mcp_to_oasf
- bridge_a2a_to_oasf
- list_capabilities

## Install
```
pip install oasf-agent-directory-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/oasf-agent-directory-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
